script: for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do echo "========== $B =========="; A=/home/azureuser/.${B}-bot/activities.jsonl; CHAT=$(tail -1 $A 2>/dev/null | jq -r '(.body|fromjson).conversation.id'); echo "  chat: $CHAT"; CAT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name ${B}-teams-catalog-id --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null); UPPER=$(echo $B | tr 'a-z' 'A-Z' | tr '-' '_'); export ${UPPER}_TEAMS_CATALOG_ID=$CAT; OUT=$(/home/azureuser/${B}-send-to.sh "✅ Diagnostic post — verifying ${B} reply delivery from VM after credential/allow-list fixes." "$CHAT" 2>&1 | tail -3); echo "  $OUT"; echo; done
